def solve(nums)
  n = nums.length
  inc = Array.new(n, 1)
  (1...n).each do |i|
    if nums[i] > nums[i-1]
      inc[i] = inc[i-1] + 1
    end
  end

  dec = Array.new(n, 1)
  (n-2).downto(0) do |i|
    if nums[i] > nums[i+1]
      dec[i] = dec[i+1] + 1
    end
  end

  inc_start = Array.new(n, 1)
  (n-2).downto(0) do |i|
    if nums[i] < nums[i+1]
      inc_start[i] = inc_start[i+1] + 1
    end
  end

  prefix_sum = Array.new(n+1, 0)
  (0...n).each do |i|
    prefix_sum[i+1] = prefix_sum[i] + nums[i]
  end

  max_sum = -Float::INFINITY

  (0...n).each do |p|
    if inc[p] >= 2 && dec[p] >= 2
      q = p + dec[p] - 1
      if inc_start[q] >= 2
        l = p - inc[p] + 1
        r = q + inc_start[q] - 1
        current_sum = prefix_sum[r+1] - prefix_sum[l]
        max_sum = [max_sum, current_sum].max
      end
    end
  end

  max_sum
end

def solve(nums)
  n = nums.length
  inc = Array.new(n, 1)
  (1...n).each do |i|
    if nums[i] > nums[i-1]
      inc[i] = inc[i-1] + 1
    end
  end

  dec = Array.new(n, 1)
  (n-2).downto(0) do |i|
    if nums[i] > nums[i+1]
      dec[i] = dec[i+1] + 1
    end
  end

  inc_start = Array.new(n, 1)
  (n-2).downto(0) do |i|
    if nums[i] < nums[i+1]
      inc_start[i] = inc_start[i+1] + 1
    end
  end

  prefix_sum = Array.new(n+1, 0)
  (0...n).each do |i|
    prefix_sum[i+1] = prefix_sum[i] + nums[i]
  end

  max_sum = -Float::INFINITY

  (0...n).each do |p|
    if inc[p] >= 2 && dec[p] >= 2
      q = p + dec[p] - 1
      if inc_start[q] >= 2
        l = p - inc[p] + 1
        r = q + inc_start[q] - 1
        current_sum = prefix_sum[r+1] - prefix_sum[l]
        max_sum = [max_sum, current_sum].max
      end
    end
  end

  max_sum
end
